description: Metadata-only arXiv discovery plan for the Phase 2A AI Research Assistant / Education-Research vertical. The plan identifies candidate papers for later human review and does not select final benchmark papers. Candidate research papers should be published or submitted between January 1, 2024 and May 30, 2026 where metadata supports date filtering.

paper_window.notes: Approved Research AI paper discovery window for Phase 2A seed curation.

query_groups.search_query: all:"LLM inference" OR all:"large language model inference" OR all:"LLM serving"
query_groups.notes: Candidate papers should help evaluate LLM serving performance, latency, throughput, memory, and batching behavior.

query_groups.search_query: all:"vLLM" OR all:"PagedAttention" OR all:"continuous batching"
query_groups.notes: Candidate papers should cover vLLM, PagedAttention, continuous batching, or related serving-system mechanisms.

query_groups.topic: speculative decoding, KV cache, prefix caching
query_groups.search_query: all:"speculative decoding" OR all:"KV cache" OR all:"prefix caching"
query_groups.notes: Candidate papers should cover decode-stage optimization, KV-cache behavior, prefix reuse, or related latency controls.

query_groups.topic: retrieval augmented generation and context engineering
query_groups.search_query: all:"retrieval augmented generation" OR all:"RAG" OR all:"context engineering"
query_groups.notes: Candidate papers should support later groundedness, retrieval, citation, and context-engineering evaluation design.

query_groups.search_query: all:"LLM routing" OR all:"model routing" OR all:"LLM router" OR all:"model selection"
query_groups.notes: Candidate papers should help define future learned routing inputs and evaluation labels.

query_groups.search_query: all:"LLM agents" OR all:"agentic workflows" OR all:"tool use"
query_groups.notes: Candidate papers should cover agentic systems, tool-use workflows, planning, or agent evaluation.

query_groups.topic: small language models and efficient LLM deployment
query_groups.search_query: all:"small language models" OR all:"efficient language models" OR all:"small language model agents"
query_groups.notes: Candidate papers should cover efficient model deployment, smaller model use, compression, distillation, or latency-aware deployment.
